jellyfin-quicksync.name: Jellyfin / QuickSync
jellyfin-quicksync.description: Intel GPU passthrough for hardware transcoding via VA-API. Adds renderD128 and card0 device nodes with correct GIDs.

immich.name: Immich
immich.description: Photo library with ML processing and optional QuickSync acceleration. Enables nesting for Compose stack and keyctl for secret management.

docker-host.name: Docker Host
docker-host.description: Run Docker (or Compose) inside an LXC container. Requires nesting and keyctl. No device passthrough.

tailscale.name: Tailscale
tailscale.description: Run Tailscale inside LXC. Passes through /dev/net/tun and enables the tun kernel module via nesting.
